title: Money and shopping
explanation:
Money and shopping

  • money: cash, card, receipt, discount, refund, afford
  • shopping: bargain, customer, queue, fit, size, exchange
  • verbs: spend, save, borrow, lend, pay

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Can I pay by credit ____? | *card | cash | receipt
This jacket is too big — it doesn't ____. | *fit | afford | lend
I can't ____ a new car right now. | *afford | borrow | refund
There was a 20% ____ on shoes. | *discount | queue | receipt

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: Keep your ____ in case you want to return it. | receipt
Can I ____ money from the bank? | borrow
That was a real ____ — only five pounds! | bargain
The shop gave me a full ____. | refund
We waited in a long ____. | queue

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I ____ too much money on clothes. | *spent | saved | lent
Can you ____ me ten pounds until Friday? | *lend | afford | refund
The ____ was very helpful. | *assistant | discount | cash
I'd like to ____ this — it's the wrong size. | *exchange | afford | save
